subtasks.description: Query MongoDB to retrieve all active billing contracts with contracted annual value and key identifiers
Query SQL warehouse to aggregate actual invoices issued in 2024 by contract, calculating total invoiced amount per contract
Reconcile contracted annual values against actual 2024 invoice totals, calculate variance percentages, flag contracts with >10% variance, and provide summary results

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks are necessary and sufficient: (1) Fetch active contracts from MongoDB (small tier—straightforward document query); (2) Aggregate 2024 invoices from SQL (small tier—single aggregation by contract ID); (3) Cross-reconciliation task (mid tier) to join both datasets, compute variance percentages, apply the >10% threshold filter, and flag exceptions. The mid tier for cross_recon accounts for the logic of matching contracts to invoices, variance calculation, and flagging thresholds. This is a genuinely multi-source reconciliation (MongoDB state + SQL transaction history), so cross_recon is required; no additional policy_action is needed as the query asks for variance flagging, not compliance evaluation.

output.sql: SELECT i.contract_id, SUM(i.amount_usd) AS total_invoiced_2024, COUNT(i.invoice_id) AS invoice_count FROM invoice_facts i WHERE i.invoice_date >= '2024-01-01' AND i.invoice_date < '2025-01-01' AND i.status IN ('paid', 'unpaid') GROUP BY i.contract_id ORDER BY i.contract_id
